query:
SELECT 
  id, 
  userId, 
  displayName, 
  livesRemaining, 
  totalPoints, 
  currentStreak,
  createdAt
FROM participants 
WHERE LOWER(displayName) IN ('chest', 'nat', 'ctm')
ORDER BY displayName;
